news-korea-econ.title: Indian Prime Minister Demands Pandemic-Era 'Work from Home' over Strait of Hormuz Fuel Crisis
news-korea-econ.description:
Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi wants coronavirus-era work from home practices to save fuel during the Strait of Hormuz oil crisis.

news-global-econ.title: Mega-mansion built on Manson murder site now a luxury rental after years of failing to find buyer
news-global-econ.description: A Beverly Hills mansion on the site of the infamous 1969 Sharon Tate murder is now a luxury rental asking nearly $250,000 a month after failing to sell.

news-global-econ.title: WNBA media rights deal balloons past $3 billion after adding new broadcast partners to 11-year portfolio
news-global-econ.description: The WNBA's media rights deal has expanded from $2.2 billion to over $3 billion, with an average annual value of roughly $281 million over 11 years.

news-global-econ.title: Maine progressive says he won’t back Schumer even after Democrats unite behind Collins challenger
news-global-econ.description: Democrat Graham Platner says he won't back Schumer as Senate leader despite a cordial call, as he gears up to challenge Sen. Collins in Maine.

news-global-econ.title: AOC’s housing agenda under fire after NYC hotel rates jump 12%
news-global-econ.description: Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez escalated her criticism of billionaires and Airbnb in a public debate over housing affordability, wealth creation, and corporate market power.

news-global-econ.title: Georgia Pride group recruiting kids as young as 13 into drag shows sparks backlash
news-global-econ.description: An Atlanta drag group called House of ALXNDR is recruiting teenagers as young as 13 to perform in drag shows during a Pride Month event in Georgia.

news-global-soc.title: LIV Golf CEO teases announcements in 'next 10 days,' talks Bryson DeChambeau's future with LIV
news-global-soc.description: Bryson DeChambeau is "more pro-LIV than I am," says CEO Scott O'Neil, as the golf league races to secure new funding after PIF's planned exit in 2026.

news-global-soc.title: China Confirms Trump Visit, Teasing 'In-Depth Exchanges' with Xi Jinping
news-global-soc.description:
The Chinese Foreign Ministry confirmed on Monday that Beijing expects President Donald Trump to visit from May 13 to 15, spending much of that time in personal exchanges with genocidal dictator Xi Jinping.
